# Accelerated Flight School

> Accelerated Flight School is an FAA-certified Part 141 and Part 61 flight school based at Van Nuys Airport (KVNY) in Los Angeles, California. The school offers private pilot, instrument rating, commercial pilot, CFI, and airline-path training at competitive prices, plus introductory discovery flights and sightseeing air tours over Los Angeles.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/): Overview of the school, programs, and how to get started.
- [Discovery Flight](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/discovery-flight-van-nuys): Book an introductory flight lesson over Van Nuys and Los Angeles.
- [Pricing](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-pricing): Full pricing for aircraft rentals and training programs.
- [Private Pilot License](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/private-pilot-van-nuys): PPL training program details, requirements, and timeline.
- [Instrument Rating](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/instrument-rating-van-nuys): IFR rating program for instrument-qualified flight.
- [Commercial Pilot Training](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/commercial-pilot-training-van-nuys): CPL program for students pursuing a professional pilot career.
- [CFI Training](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/cfi-training-van-nuys): Certified Flight Instructor certificate program.
- [Airline Pilot Path](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/airline-pilot-path-van-nuys): End-to-end pathway from zero hours to airline first officer.
- [FAQ](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/faq): Common questions about learning to fly, cost, and timelines.
- [Contact](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-contact): Phone, email, and address for the school.
- [About Us](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-about): School history, mission, and instructors.
- [Our Aircraft](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-aircraft): Fleet of training aircraft available for rent and instruction.
- [Instructors](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-instructors): Meet the flight instructor team.
- [Air Tours Hub](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/los-angeles-air-tours): Scenic sightseeing flights over Los Angeles and surrounding areas.
- [Areas Served](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/flight-school-near-los-angeles-accelerated-flight-school-van-nuys-kvny): Cities and communities served within the greater Los Angeles area.
- [Deals & Coupons](https://acceleratedflightschool.net/van-nuys-accelerated-flight-school-deals-coupons): Current promotions and flight training discounts.

## Sitemap
